title: Not So Safe
relevance_summary: Malicious JavaScript injected into Safe{Wallet} website to exploit Cold Wallet signers

prevention.rule: Block any tx that originates from a known malicious Safe{Wallet} URL or injects malicious JavaScript

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that originates from a known malicious Safe{Wallet} URL or injects malicious JavaScript
summary: North Korean hackers exploited a syntax error in a YAML file to inject malicious JavaScript into Safe{Wallet}'s website, tricking ByBit's Cold Wallet signers into executing a transaction that transferred funds to the attackers.
